## What changed and why

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated (if this touches an API endpoint)

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or raw model-provider keys in this diff
- [ ] RLS ships in the same PR as any new table
